subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Thy letter hath appeared before the Divine Throne, and We have perused what was contained therein of thy words, and We bear witness that thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی قد حضر بین یدی العرش کتابک و اطلعنا بما فیه من کلماتک و شهدنا بانک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God the only route to knowledge of God, @idolatry
